generation_instructions: Provide a concise summary of the proposed research project, including the project's goals, objectives, and significance. Include both a general audience abstract and a technical abstract (2000 character max each).  The abstract should be written in a clear and accessible style.
name: abstract_section
search_queries: project goals and objectives research proposal
title: Abstract

generation_instructions: Provide a detailed description of the research plan, including background, specific aims, preliminary data, experimental design and methods, and statistical analysis plan. Also include an explanation of the project's potential for clinical impact and fit with the funder's goals. This section is limited to 5 pages.
name: research_plan
title: Research Plan

generation_instructions: Describe the project team and the role of each member. If applicable, explain the mentorship plan and the experience of mentors. Highlight the expertise of team members and how it is relevant to the project goals
name: team_and_mentorship
search_queries: team member expertise and relevance to project goals
team member training and development plan
title: Team and Mentorship

generation_instructions: Describe the project's significance and potential impact, fitting within MRA's research portfolio. Detail how the research addresses important gaps or problems in the field. Discuss the translational potential of the project and its relevance to MRA's goals.
name: project_relevance
search_queries: impact of research on melanoma treatment
relevance of research to melanoma research alliance goals
policy implications of melanoma research findings
clinical significance of melanoma research outcomes
title: Project Relevance

generation_instructions: List and provide contact information for all key personnel including the Principal Investigator, co-investigators, mentors, young investigators, and collaborators. Provide ORCID IDs for PI, Young Investigator and Mentors. Clearly specify the role and contribution of each person.
name: key_personnel
title: Key Personnel

generation_instructions: List all current and pending funding for the applicant and other key personnel (for Team Science Applications). Describe any overlap with the proposed project. Upload NIH format biosketches for all key personnel.
name: current_and_pending_support
title: Current and Pending Support

generation_instructions: Provide a detailed justification for all budget items, including personnel, supplies, and equipment. Explain how the funds will be used to accomplish the project goals. For Academic-Industry Partnership applications, clearly explain the contributions from both MRA and the industry partner. Include any costs associated with MRA's data sharing policy.  If required, upload budget justification documents.
name: budget_justification
title: Budget Justification

generation_instructions: Describe your plan for sharing data and resources generated from the project to promote rapid research advancement, transparency, reproducibility, and collaboration. Explain how you will post outputs to pre-print servers and public data repositories, and publish in open-access journals. Detail how you will comply with MRA's data sharing policy. Include any costs associated with MRA's data sharing policy within the budget.
name: data_sharing
title: Data Sharing Plan

generation_instructions: Include letters of support from mentors and industry partners if applicable. The mentor letters should confirm that the applicant has an independent research program and a brief statement about the applicant, the Mentor's role, mentoring plan, and research environment.
name: letters_of_support
search_queries: letters of support mentor independent research program
mentor letter applicant research mentoring plan
industry partner support letter research collaboration
title: Letters of Support

generation_instructions: If the proposal includes a clinical trial, attach a protocol synopsis, a timeline, and project milestones. Include IRB and regulatory approval timelines, patient accrual timeline, and completion of analyses timeline.
name: clinical_trial_info
search_queries: IRB regulatory approval timeline clinical trial
clinical trial data analysis timeline milestones
research feasibility clinical trial project plan
title: Clinical Trial Information

generation_instructions: Complete the Applicant Eligibility Checklist to confirm eligibility for the award. Requires signature of the Department Chair, Division Head, or Dean.
name: eligibility_checklist
title: Eligibility Checklist
